meta.homeDescription: RICORTU è un'app privata per i ricordi di viaggio: colleziona città, illumina Paesi e custodisce foto e ricordi senza tracciamento.
meta.privacyDescription: Read the RICORTU privacy policy for the iOS and Android private travel memory app, including local-first data handling, maps, photos, feedback, deletion requests, and GDPR rights.
meta.termsDescription: Leggi i termini di RICORTU per usare un atlante privato e un'app per ricordi di viaggio.
meta.deleteTitle: Elimina il tuo account RICORTU e i tuoi dati
meta.deleteDescription: Richiedi l'eliminazione del tuo account RICORTU, dei dati cloud, dei ricordi sincronizzati, degli identificatori dispositivo e dei feedback collegati.

home.eyebrow: Un atlante privato per i tuoi viaggi
home.title: Trasforma i tuoi viaggi in un atlante privato.
home.subtitle: Colleziona città, illumina Paesi, custodisci foto e ricordi — senza essere tracciato.
home.problemTitle: I ricordi di viaggio raramente restano in un solo posto.
home.problemText: Si disperdono tra foto, note, pin sulle mappe, ricevute, messaggi e app dimenticate. La forma di una vita in movimento diventa difficile da vedere, anche quando quei luoghi contano ancora.
home.valueTitle: Un archivio privato per città visitate, Paesi e territori collezionati.
home.value1Text: Segna i luoghi in cui hai vissuto, amato, sostato e ricordato.
home.value2Text: Guarda Paesi e città raccogliersi in una mappa che appartiene solo a te.
home.value3Text: Salva note, date, foto e frammenti senza trasformarli in un feed.
home.value4Text: Tieni vicini i luoghi che sogni, senza confonderli con quelli in cui sei già stato.
home.not2: Non è una guida di viaggio.
home.difference: RICORTU è un archivio privato per i luoghi che sono diventati parte di te.
home.useTitle: Creato per viaggiatori che cercano memoria, non performance.
home.use4: Persone che amano mappe e archivi personali
home.previewTitle: Mappa, dettaglio città, wishlist, statistiche e card condivisibili in un sistema calmo.
home.seoTitle: Un'app per ricordi di viaggio più silenziosi.
home.seoText: RICORTU è pensato per chi cerca una mappa personale di viaggio, un tracker di città visitate, un archivio di viaggio, un tracker di Paesi visitati o un diario privato di viaggio che custodisce la memoria senza trasformarla in performance.
home.waitlistTitle: Inizia a costruire la mappa della tua vita.
home.waitlistText: Unisciti alla lista per un archivio di viaggio privato che non è una guida, un feed social o un tracker di posizione.

waitlist.privacy: Useremo la tua email solo per aggiornamenti sull'accesso anticipato a RICORTU. Nessun profilo pubblico, nessun tracciamento GPS, nessun feed condiviso.
waitlist.success: Sei nella lista d'attesa. Ti scriveremo con discrezione.
waitlist.error: Al momento non è possibile unirsi alla lista d'attesa.

privacy.label: Privacy policy
privacy.title: RICORTU Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how RICORTU collects, uses, stores, shares, and protects information when you use the RICORTU app, website, and related services.
privacy.s1Text: RICORTU is a private travel memory app for iOS and Android. The app helps users save visited places, countries, wish-list destinations, notes, photos, travel memories, and map-based place records.
privacy.s2Text: Depending on how you use RICORTU, we may collect or process:
s2Items: Travel memory data you create, such as visited cities, countries, wish-list destinations, travel dates, notes, map coordinates, and place records.
Photos you choose to attach to travel memories or feedback messages.
Photo and file metadata, such as timestamps, file type, file size, local file references, location metadata embedded in photos, and place associations.
Device or app instance identifiers used to support local data, feedback, troubleshooting, and future cloud archive features.
Feedback and support messages, including optional image attachments you choose to send.
Basic technical and diagnostic information provided by platform services, generated by app errors, or submitted with support requests.
Waitlist email addresses submitted through the RICORTU website.
RICORTU does not collect contacts, SMS messages, call logs, health data, or continuous GPS tracking data.
s3Items: Provide, operate, maintain, and improve RICORTU.
Let you create and manage your private travel atlas.
Save cities, countries, dates, notes, photos, wish-list destinations, and map-based records you choose to add.
Display maps, place search results, and geocoding results.
Provide limited local archive, backup preparation, or future cloud archive features where available.
Respond to feedback, support, privacy, and deletion requests.
Protect the app from abuse, errors, and service misuse.
Improve reliability and diagnose crashes or technical issues where such diagnostics are available.
Send waitlist or product updates if you asked to receive them.
We do not use your private travel records or photos for advertising profiles.
privacy.s4Text: RICORTU is not a GPS tracking app and does not continuously monitor your location. The app is based on places you choose to save, such as cities, countries, wish-list destinations, or map-based place records. If you use map display, place search, or geocoding features, selected place information, search queries, approximate map regions, coordinates, and technical request data may be processed by map providers such as Mapbox so that maps and search can work. If you import photos from your device, RICORTU may read location metadata embedded in those photos, only after you grant the required photo or media permissions and choose to use the photo import feature.
privacy.s5Text: You may choose to attach photos to travel memories. Photos stored only on your device are not automatically uploaded to RICORTU. Currently, regular memory photos are intended to stay on your device unless you explicitly use a feature that uploads them. If you send feedback with an image attachment, that attachment may be uploaded to our cloud storage so we can review your support request. If RICORTU later enables cloud photo archive, backup, or sync, uploaded photos and related metadata may be stored using our cloud providers, and the app will describe that feature before or when you enable it. RICORTU does not use your private photos for public galleries, advertising profiles, or sale to third parties.
privacy.s6Title: Cloud Archive and Future Account Features
privacy.s6Text: RICORTU currently works primarily as a local private travel archive. Some versions may include limited travel data backup or cloud archive preparation features. If RICORTU later offers account features, broader cloud archive, or photo cloud archive, we will update this Privacy Policy and related in-app disclosures before or when those features become available. Photos remain on your device unless you choose a feature that uploads them, such as feedback attachments or a future cloud archive feature.
privacy.s7Text: RICORTU may use third-party service providers to operate the app:
s7Items: Mapbox for maps, geocoding, map display, and place search.
Supabase for feedback storage, optional image attachments submitted with feedback, database infrastructure, storage infrastructure, and future cloud archive features.
Google Play and Google services for Android app distribution, app review, app integrity, platform functionality, crash reporting, and diagnostics where enabled.
These providers may process data according to their own privacy policies and terms. We use service providers to provide, protect, and improve RICORTU, not to sell your personal data.
privacy.s8Text: RICORTU is private by default. Your saved places, notes, photos, wish-list destinations, travel memories, and map-based records are not public unless you choose to export or share them. If you create a share card, export an image, save a file, or send content to another app or person, that exported copy is controlled by the destination app, service, or recipient.
privacy.s9Text: We retain personal data for as long as reasonably necessary to provide RICORTU, maintain local app functionality, provide customer support, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, prevent abuse, enforce terms, and protect service security. Local-only data stored on your device remains on that device until you delete the app, clear app data, or remove the content yourself. Feedback records and attachments may be retained as long as needed to review, respond to, and improve the app. Waitlist email addresses may be retained until you unsubscribe or request deletion.
privacy.s10Text: You can request deletion of feedback records, uploaded feedback attachments, waitlist information, or any cloud data associated with your email address by contacting privacy@ricortu.app. If you used RICORTU without signing in, provide any information that may help us identify your request, such as the email address used for feedback or waitlist submission, or state that you were a local-only user. If a version of RICORTU offers account or cloud archive features, you can request deletion of account or cloud data by contacting privacy@ricortu.app. If an in-app deletion option is available in your version, you may also use that option. Local-only data on your device can be deleted by removing the content in the app, clearing app data, or uninstalling the app. We aim to process deletion requests within 30 days unless we need to retain limited information for legal, security, fraud-prevention, abuse-prevention, or dispute-resolution reasons.
privacy.s11Text: We use reasonable technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect personal data, including access controls, encrypted network connections where applicable, and security practices offered by our service providers. However, no method of transmission, processing, or storage is completely secure. You are responsible for keeping your device, operating system, email account, and any account credentials if account features become available in the future secure.
privacy.s12Text: RICORTU is not designed for children under 13 or the minimum age required by local law to use online services without parental consent. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children below that age. If you believe that a child has provided personal data to RICORTU, contact privacy@ricortu.app so we can review the situation and delete the information where appropriate.
privacy.s13Text: RICORTU and its service providers may process, transfer, and store information in countries other than the country where you live. These countries may have data protection laws that differ from your local laws. Where required, we rely on appropriate safeguards for international data transfers, such as contractual protections or service provider transfer mechanisms.
privacy.s14Text: If you are in the European Economic Area, United Kingdom, or Switzerland, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to processing of your personal data, and to request portability of your data. You may also have the right to withdraw consent where processing is based on consent and to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority. To exercise these rights, contact privacy@ricortu.app. We may need to verify your request before acting on it.
privacy.s15Text: RICORTU does not sell personal data. We do not sell your saved places, notes, photos, wish-list destinations, travel memories, account information, waitlist email address, or feedback data to advertisers, data brokers, or third parties.
privacy.s16Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time as RICORTU evolves, as features change, or as legal requirements change. When we update the policy, we will revise the Last updated date above. If changes are material, we may provide additional notice through the app, website, or email where appropriate.
privacy.s17Text: For privacy questions, GDPR or data rights requests, or deletion requests, contact privacy@ricortu.app. For general support, contact support@ricortu.app. Please do not include sensitive information in email unless necessary for your request.

terms.label: Termini
terms.title: Termini per un archivio personale calmo.
terms.intro: Questi termini descrivono l'uso previsto di RICORTU come app privata per ricordi di viaggio, luoghi salvati, città visitate e note personali.
terms.s1Text: RICORTU è pensato per custodire ricordi di viaggio personali, costruire mappe private e salvare destinazioni future.
terms.s2Text: Sei responsabile dei luoghi, delle note e dei ricordi che aggiungi al tuo atlante.
terms.s3Text: RICORTU non deve essere usato come sistema di navigazione, tracker di sicurezza o servizio di posizione in tempo reale.
terms.s4Text: Concetti iniziali del prodotto e funzioni della lista d'attesa possono cambiare durante lo sviluppo.
terms.s5Text: Per domande su questi termini scrivi a support@ricortu.app.

deleteAccount.label: Diritti sui dati
deleteAccount.title: Elimina il tuo account RICORTU e i tuoi dati
deleteAccount.intro: Puoi richiedere in qualsiasi momento l'eliminazione del tuo account RICORTU e dei dati cloud.
deleteAccount.included1: Il tuo account Supabase e l'email dell'account.
deleteAccount.included2: Città sincronizzate nel cloud, date di viaggio, note, metadata delle foto e identificatore del dispositivo.
deleteAccount.included3: Record di feedback associabili al tuo account o device ID.
deleteAccount.included4: Se in futuro sarà attiva la sincronizzazione cloud delle foto, saranno inclusi anche i file fotografici caricati.
deleteAccount.notIncludedTitle: Cosa non viene eliminato dai nostri server
deleteAccount.notIncluded1: I dati salvati solo nel database SQLite locale sul telefono. Per rimuovere dati solo locali, disinstalla l'app o cancella i dati app dalle impostazioni del dispositivo.
deleteAccount.notIncluded2: Immagini, esportazioni o share card già salvate o condivise fuori da RICORTU.
deleteAccount.requestText: Invia un'email a support@ricortu.app con oggetto Delete my RICORTU account. Includi l'indirizzo email usato per l'account RICORTU. Se hai usato RICORTU senza accesso, fornisci il device ID dalle Impostazioni o indica che il tuo archivio era solo locale.
deleteAccount.timeline: Elaboreremo le richieste di eliminazione entro 30 giorni.
deleteAccount.faqLocalA: Foto e dati archivio salvati solo sul dispositivo non vengono caricati su RICORTU. Disinstalla l'app o cancella i dati app per rimuovere i dati solo locali.
deleteAccount.faqSyncedA: Dati account cloud, città, date, note, metadata, identificatori dispositivo e feedback associati vengono eliminati dopo verifica ed elaborazione della richiesta.

footer.text: Un atlante privato per città, Paesi e ricordi che sono diventati parte della tua vita.
